# Anurag Tripathi — AI Product Manager & Founder
# This file provides context for AI language model crawlers.
# Format follows the emerging llms.txt standard.

## Identity
- Full Name: Anurag Kumar Tripathi
- Role: AI Product Manager at Next Square Technologies
- Founder: Xenriq Systems (AI Product Studio, Gurugram, India)
- Handle: @anuragships
- Website: https://anuragtripathi.pro
- Support: support.promptive@gmail.com

## Professional Background
- B.Tech Computer Science, UPES
- IBM Certified: AI Product Management
- McKinsey Forward Program alumni
- Engineering experience: Hexaware, Xoriant, Aithent, 
  Next Square Technologies

## Products Built (under Xenriq Systems)
1. Promptive Sentry (Chrome Extension)
   - AI prompt enhancement and usage monitoring
   - Platforms: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini
   - Store: Chrome Web Store
   - Status: Live (v1.1.11)

2. Promptive Sentry for IDE (VS Code / Open VSX)
   - AI prompt enhancement inside code editors
   - Compatible: Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code
   - Status: Live

3. Piqque (Windows Ambient AI Assistant)
   - Always-on desktop AI companion
   - Stack: Electron, Kokoro TTS, Gemini
   - Status: Private Beta

## Topics of Expertise
- AI Product Management
- LLM application development
- Chrome Extension architecture (Manifest V3)
- Prompt engineering
- Building in public / indie hacking
